stemHtml: For (1) _____ aeroplane(s), the take-off distance calculations must take into account (2) _____ and (3) _____.

options.a: (1) single engine and multi-engine; (2) up to 50% headwind; (3) no less than 150% tailwind.
options.b: (1) single engine; (2) up to 50% headwind; (3) more than 150% tailwind.
options.c: (1) multi-engine; (2) more than 50% headwind; (3) no less than 150% tailwind.
options.d: (1) single engine and multi-engine; (2) more than 50% headwind; (3) up to 150% tailwind.
